S

S_EMPLOYEE - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the employees
S_EXCHANGE - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the exchanges
S_ORDER - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the orders
S_PACK - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the packs
S_SECOND_HAND - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the second-hand products
S_STORE - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the store
S_VALUATION_PROD - Enum constant in enum class search.SearchType
A search made within the valuation products
SaverLoader - Class in store
It implements the store's saver and loader
SaverLoader() - Constructor for class store.SaverLoader
The saver loader's constructor
saveStore(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class store.SaverLoader
It saves the store
search - package search
This packages contains all the tools needed to make a search.
searchByCategory(Category...) - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches store products filtered by category.
searchByID(int) - Method in class search.SearchEmployee
Searches for an employee by their ID.
searchByID(int) - Method in class search.SearchExchange
Searches for an exchange by its ID.
searchByID(int) - Method in interface search.SearchID
Searches for an object by its ID.
searchByID(int) - Method in class search.SearchOrder
Searches for an order by its ID.
searchByID(int) - Method in class search.SearchPack
Searches for a pack by its ID.
SearchEmployee - Class in search
This class implements a search mechanism to find employees in the store by their unique identifier (ID).
SearchEmployee() - Constructor for class search.SearchEmployee
Constructs a SearchEmployee object and initializes the employee list from the store.
searchEmployeeByID(int) - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches for an employee by their ID.
searchEmployeeByID(int) - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the employee based on the id
searchEmployeeByID(int) - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the employee based on the id
Searcher - Class in search
This class acts as the main search manager, grouping together all search functionalities available in the package.
Searcher(SearchStoreProducts) - Constructor for class search.Searcher
Creates the master searcher.
Searcher(SearchStoreProducts, SearchType...) - Constructor for class search.Searcher
Creates the master searcher with specific search types enabled.
SearchExchange - Class in search
This class implements a search mechanism to find exchanges by their ID.
SearchExchange() - Constructor for class search.SearchExchange
Creates the class and initializes the list of exchanges obtained from the store.
SearchExchange(List<Exchange>) - Constructor for class search.SearchExchange
Creates the class with a custom list of exchanges.
searchExchangeByID(int) - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches for an exchange by its ID.
searchExchangeByID(int) - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the exchange based on the id
searchExchangeByID(int) - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the exchange based on the id
SearchID - Interface in search
This interface defines a generic contract for searching objects by their ID.
SearchOrder - Class in search
This class implements a search mechanism to find orders by their ID.
SearchOrder() - Constructor for class search.SearchOrder
Creates the class and initializes the list of orders obtained from the store.
searchOrderByID(int) - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches for an order by its ID.
searchOrderByID(int) - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the order based on the id
searchOrderByID(int) - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the order based on the id
searchOrderByID(int) - Method in class user.OrderPermission
Searches for the order based on the id
SearchPack - Class in search
This class implements a search mechanism to find packs by their ID.

Creates the class and initializes the list of packs obtained from the store.
searchPackByID(int) - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches for a pack by its ID.
searchPackByID(int) - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the pack based on the id
searchPackByID(int) - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the pack based on the id
searchSecondHandProducts() - Method in class search.BrowseSecondHandProducts
Retrieves all second-hand products sorted in alphabetical order by name.
searchSecondHandProducts() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Searches for the second-hand products
searchStoreProduct() - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the store products based on the filters
searchStoreProduct() - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the store products based on the filters
searchStoreProduct() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Searches for the store products based on the filters
searchStoreProduct() - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
Searches for the store products
searchStoreProductByCategory(Category...) - Method in class user.Employee
Searches for the store products based on the filters and the categories
searchStoreProductByCategory(Category...) - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
Searches for the store products based on the category
searchStoreProductCategory(Category...) - Method in class user.Manager
Searches for the store products based on the filters and categories
searchStoreProducts() - Method in class search.Searcher
Searches store products using the filters defined in SearchStoreProducts.
searchStoreProducts() - Method in class search.SearchStoreProducts
Searches products filtered only by price and/or punctuation.
searchStoreProducts(Category...) - Method in class search.SearchStoreProducts
Searches products filtered by price, punctuation, and optionally by categories.
SearchStoreProducts - Class in search
This class implements product filtering based on price, rating, and category.
SearchStoreProducts(boolean) - Constructor for class search.SearchStoreProducts
Creates the searcher with no initial filters.
SearchType - Enum Class in search
It implements the type of searches that will be done
SecondHandProduct - Class in product
It implements the second-hand products
SecondHandProduct(double, String, String, String, ProductType, LocalDate, boolean, boolean, ConservationStatus, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class product.SecondHandProduct
Creates a new second-hand product
SecondHandProduct(String, double, String, String, String, ProductType, LocalDate, boolean, boolean, ConservationStatus, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class product.SecondHandProduct
A second-hand product's general constructor
SecondHandProduct(String, String, String, ProductType, boolean, boolean, ConservationStatus, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class product.SecondHandProduct
Creates a new second-hand product with no valuation
SecondHandProduct(String, String, String, ProductType, RegisteredClient) - Constructor for class product.SecondHandProduct
Creates a new second-hand product that hasn't paid the valuation

Checks if a password is secure

It gets the store product listed as n.º productNum in a certain page
